.. _fieldplot:

fieldplot
=========

**inherit_from**: ['baseplot']

Summary
-------

+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|keyword                  |default                  |attribute                |value                    |
+=========================+=========================+=========================+=========================+
|**archive_type**         |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**colorbar_title**       |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**file_tmpl**            |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**has_title**            |True                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**ignore_missing_files** |False                    |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*alias*                  |ignore_missing           |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**plotdata**             |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**root_tmpl**            |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**staging_rate**         |hourly                   |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+

+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**title_font**           |                         |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*type*                   |plotfont                 |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|**tree_tmpl**            |None                     |                         |                         |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*lowercase*              |False                    |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*optional*               |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
|                         |                         |*unique*                 |True                     |
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+
+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+-------------------------+

Keywords
--------

archive_type
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

colorbar_title
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

A string specifying the text template to use for the title of the colormap

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

file_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_title
^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

Switches the display of the plot title on and off

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

ignore_missing_files
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

When accessing files, if a file is missing, the application can either fail and report the error, or ignore the problem and carry on

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |ignore_missing                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

plotdata
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

A directive specifying meta data for the type of data being plotted (obssdate, odsdata, scoredata, etc...)

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

root_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

staging_rate
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **hourly**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title
^^^^^

default: **None**

This is a list of strings making the plot title. Each element of the list represents one different line. Plots have default templates for the title, if you would like to only override one line of the title and keep the other lines as the default definition, specify None for the lines which should have the default template.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title_font
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

A plotfont directive defining different parameters for the font to use for the title

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |plotfont                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

tree_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

generated on 2012-11-04 20:07:44
